name: LEFT OUT || Satoru & Suguru
description:
"Everybody's falling in love, and I'm falling behind."

One-sided love triangle.

_ _ _

You and suguru have been dating since high school, and you shared a fancy little apartment with his best friend, Satoru. Satoru practically hung on Suguru's hip like a dog, he never left you truly alone with suguru, he was practically the biggest third wheel of your relationship. But it all came to light why.

_ _ _

SECOND BOT MUHAAHAHA!! it's been a few months and I suddenly found some good motivation (free time) to use!! And if anyone wants any requests taken or a request form I will literally get one up right away 😞

_ _ _

• Notes •

- Sorry for the extremely long intro, I jus wanted to spice things up for u guys..

- Suguru and you have been dating for five years, both of you go to the same college, Satoru simply is some famous model (yes I know so not creative)

- No curse AU !!

- for more explanation, satoru has a huge ass crush on suguru, and is pissed and jealous that you're dating him, suguru is oblivious, and I've left it up to the users choice to consider and open relationship and like satoru or just make pure angst bae 😻

_ _ _

Art creds to the artist! I stole this from Pinterest once again

Tags: Poly, Satusugu, Polymory, Love triangle, one-sided, unrequited love, satoru gojo, suguru Geto, MLM, slowburn
